blended.narrative: Blue Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
